Service Areas

National operations.
One compliance standard.

Five offices across Australia. 1,000+ sites serviced daily. The same ISO-certified, carbon neutral cleaning program delivered in every state and territory we operate.

5 Offices
1,000+ Sites Daily
6 States + ACT
30+ Years National

Site Footprint

1,000+ sites across Australia

Government buildings, defence facilities, industrial sites, education campuses and commercial offices. Click any marker to see the region.

Coverage by State

Where CPC operates

Queensland

QLD

Brisbane HQ + Townsville office

  • South East QLD Brisbane Metro, Ipswich, Logan, Redcliffe, Moreton Bay
  • Gold & Sunshine Coasts Gold Coast, Sunshine Coast, Noosa, Maroochydore, Gympie
  • Wide Bay Bundaberg, Hervey Bay, Maryborough, Kingaroy, Nanango
  • Darling Downs Toowoomba, Dalby, Warwick, Stanthorpe, Roma
  • Central QLD Rockhampton, Gladstone, Yeppoon, Emerald
  • North QLD Townsville, Bowen, Cairns, Atherton Tablelands, Innisfail
  • Far North QLD Port Douglas, Mossman, Daintree, Weipa
  • Far West QLD Mount Isa, Longreach, Cloncurry, Normanton
  • Remote QLD Thursday Island, Bamaga, Lockhart River, Aurukun, Mornington Island, Cherbourg

New South Wales

NSW

Sydney office

  • Sydney Metro CBD, Mascot, Olympic Park, Inner West, North Shore, Western Sydney
  • Hunter Valley Newcastle, Rutherford, Minto, Cardiff, Beresfield
  • Central Coast Gosford, Charmhaven, Charlestown, Hornsby
  • Illawarra Wollongong, North Wollongong
  • Mid North Coast Port Macquarie, Coffs Harbour, Grafton, Ballina
  • Southern NSW Albury, Moss Vale, Nowra
  • ACT Canberra, Fyshwick, Canberra Airport

Victoria

VIC

Melbourne office

  • Melbourne Metro CBD, Docklands, Tullamarine, Tarneit, Forest Hill

Western Australia

WA

Perth office

  • Perth Metro CBD, Fremantle, Perth Airport, Kewdale

South Australia

SA

Serviced from Melbourne office

  • Adelaide Adelaide CBD, Adelaide Airport

Tasmania

TAS

Serviced from Melbourne office

  • Launceston Launceston Airport

Sectors Serviced Nationally

The same standards, wherever you operate

Every site CPC services. regardless of state or sector. operates under the same triple ISO-certified management system, the same carbon neutral program and the same workforce compliance framework.

For New Clients

Tell us about your sector and sites. We'll design a compliance-driven cleaning program around your obligations and schedule.

  • ✓ Site assessment included
  • ✓ Sector-specific proposal
  • ✓ Response within 5 business days

For Procurement Teams

Due Diligence Hub

All compliance credentials in one place for formal procurement evaluation. No request required.

  • ✓ ISO 9001 / 14001 / 45001 certificates
  • ✓ Modern slavery statement
  • ✓ Social procurement documentation
  • ✓ Insurance and WHS documentation
